results.title: 'History created at the Mecca of Cricket!': Kedar Jadhav hails Kranti Goud's Lord's feat
results.description: New Delhi: Former India all-rounder Kedar Jadhav congratulated pacer Kranti Goud after she etched her name into cricketing history with a five-wicket haul in the one-off women's Test against England...

results.title: John Russell departs Sligo Rovers to take charge at Shelbourne
results.description: The 41-year-old has signed a “long-term agreement” with the 2024 Premier Division champions.
